race.comment: LONDON BOY (4) did a good job last time, finishing in the money when third over a similar trip at Albury. Should enjoy a nice run from the low draw and looks suited in this contest fourth-up. ANDALE ANDALE (1) is back in class after finishing out of the placings at Randwick six-and-a-half weeks ago. This is a fair bit easier and she will appreciate reuniting with Dillon, who's 2/2 when partnering. Can figure in the finish back in this company. CHARLIE MAGIC (8) has been thereabouts lately without being able to break through, the latest effort a third at Parkes over 1300m. Doesn't need to improve much to break a long run of outs. PLENITUDE (2) has been in the market at his last couple of runs but failed to threaten. Peak fitness now, so keeping safe for a minor placing.
